description_long: This is a sleek, modern duffel-style briefcase made primarily of black synthetic leather or coated fabric, featuring a smooth, matte finish. The main body is cylindrical with rounded ends, and it has two sturdy, flexible handles attached at the top for hand carrying, as well as a longer, adjustable shoulder strap. The front face displays a geometric logo and the word 'SIMPLA' in light blue, adding a touch of branding and style. There are visible zippers on both ends, suggesting side compartments, and a large zipper runs along the top for main compartment access. The base appears reinforced and slightly thicker, likely for durability and structure. The overall design is minimalist, with subtle stitching and no visible external hardware apart from the zippers and handles.
description: A modern, black duffel-style briefcase with dual handles, a shoulder strap, and a geometric 'SIMPLA' logo on the front. It features multiple zippered compartments and a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing a rounded end with a visible zipper outlining a side compartment and the dual top handles.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'SIMPLA' logo, main zippered compartment, and both handles and shoulder strap clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a rounded end and a zipper, mirroring the other side's compartment.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a large, uninterrupted surface with a long zipper, likely for an additional compartment.
attribute_handle_type: Two flexible, looped handles made of synthetic leather or nylon, stitched to the top of the briefcase, and one adjustable, flexible shoulder strap attached with metal hardware.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Zipper closures on the main compartment, side compartments, and rear compartment; no visible lock mechanism.
attribute_brand_logo: A geometric logo and the word 'SIMPLA' in light blue are visible on the front center of the briefcase.
attribute_external_pockets: Two zippered side compartments on each rounded end and one large zippered compartment on the rear.
